The guest bedroom has a walk in closet and an attached bathroom. Both the bedrooms have a view of the private lawn in the rear. The villa is 11 years old, having been registered in 2023. The quarterly maintenance is around Rs 30,000.

resultList.dtldesc: Property DetailsThis independent residential house for sale is located in the well established locality of Cox Town in Bangalore. The property is built in a G plus 1 floor configuration and offers spacious living arrangements suitable for large families or multi generational living. The house is semi furnished and includes significant storage facilities throughout the property with lofts available in all rooms. The ground floor and first floor are connected through external stairs, and there is an additional staircase leading to the open terrace area.Property SpecificationsThe ground floor consists of 3 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, and 1 Indian style toilet located outside the third bedroom. The first floor includes 2 bedrooms, 1 store room, 1 pooja room with shelves, and a handwash cum washing machine area. The first floor also has 1 Indian style toilet and 1 western style toilet with bathroom. The property features mosaic flooring on the first floor and traditional red oxide style flooring on the ground floor, with the same flooring pattern continued in the master bedrooms. Both floors have normal kitchens with granite platforms and cabinets along with multiple electrical points for appliances such as microwave ovens and mixer grinders. The house also includes wooden storage units in most rooms and a small showcase in the living area. Every room is fitted with sufficient lighting and ceiling fans, and geysers are installed in the bathrooms.FacilityThis is an independent house and offers a peaceful residential atmosphere without shared society facilities. The property includes a small parking space within the compound suitable for two wheelers along with a verandah and a small storage garage area on the ground floor. The house does not have piped gas connection, power backup, security services, or CCTV surveillance. However, the spacious layout, excellent storage provisions, and separate access to both floors make it ideal for families looking for independent living with privacy and flexibility.LocalityCox Town is a centrally located and highly sought after residential locality known for its excellent connectivity and peaceful surroundings. The area provides easy access to reputed schools, hospitals, supermarkets, restaurants, shopping centers, and entertainment hubs. Nearby locations such as Frazer Town, Ulsoor, and MG Road further enhance the convenience of the property location. The locality is well connected through major roads and public transport facilities, making daily commuting easy to different parts of Bangalore.

resultList.dtldesc: Designed with contemporary architecture and top-notch finishes, this Freehold 2 BHK Flat available for sale in Challaghatta, Bangalore offers a perfect blend of urban convenience and serene living. Strategically located near major highways and metro connectivity, this property ensures easy access to everything you need. Dont miss the opportunity to own a dream home in one of Bangalores most promising localesProperty Specifications This newly constructed 2 BHK flat, with a super built-up area of 1190 sq ft is tailored to meet the needs of discerning buyers seeking a vibrant yet tranquil lifestyle. Located on the first floor of a four-storey building, this west-facing flat is designed with a keen eye for aesthetics and functionality. Featuring well-ventilated and naturally bright spaces, this flat offers a spacious layout including two well-proportioned bedrooms offering a comfortable space to relax after a hectic day. There are also 2 western-style bathrooms of which one bathroom is attached to the bedroom and the other is available for common use, both ready with geyser points. A balcony attached to the bedroom offers picturesque garden views, providing a serene space for relaxation. The living and dining areas are thoughtfully separated, allowing for versatile interior decor options. For a comfortable cooking experience, the kitchen comes with a granite platform, a stainless steel sink, and a utility area attached. The entire flat is adorned with vitrified flooring over 830 sq ft of the carpet area, adding to its contemporary charm.Facilities A host of amenities that make life easier and more secure include ample covered parking space for your vehicle ensures safety and convenience, uninterrupted access to water for hassle-free living, 100 power backup to handle any electricity outages, and two lifts ensure easy accessibility, even during peak hours. Additionally, to ensure day and night safety to you and your loved ones, there is a well-trained security guard and CCTV surveillance for peace of mind.Locality Situated close to the renowned EGL Tech Park which is the nearest landmark from where at 1km range are several esteemed schools which makes it an ideal destination for a family with children. For any medical emergencies, you can rush to the well-known hospitals, clinics, and nursing homes that are at 1km. Many shopping centers and supermarkets are all within a 1 km radius, ensuring that everything you need is just a short distance away. Cabs, taxis, buses and autos are easily accessible, while the nearest metro station is just 3 km away, offering seamless connectivity to the rest of Bangalore. The railway station is also conveniently located at a distance of 7 km, making this home perfect for frequent travellers.

resultList.dtldesc: Located in the highly sought-after HRBR Layout, Bangalore, this spacious 2 BHK apartment in Elegant Kevin offers an exceptional combination of comfort, connectivity, and long-term value. Positioned close to the Outer Ring Road, the property enjoys excellent access to major business districts, lifestyle destinations, and essential civic infrastructure, making it an ideal choice for both homeowners and investors.Property SpecificationsThis semi-furnished apartment features a generous super built-up area of approximately 1500 sq. ft. and a carpet area of 1400 sq. ft., providing spacious interiors rarely found in contemporary 2 BHK residences. Situated on the 3rd floor of a well-maintained 5-storey building, the apartment is part of the Elegant Kevin residential development, a low-density community comprising only a limited number of units.The residence includes two well-proportioned bedrooms, two bathrooms, and two balconies, ensuring ample ventilation and natural light throughout the day. The layout features separate living and dining areas, offering enhanced privacy and functionality for family living. The modular kitchen is equipped with a chimney and ample storage provisions, making it practical for modern households.Granite flooring throughout the apartment adds durability and elegance while complementing the overall aesthetic appeal of the home. The property is east-facing and Vastu compliant, making it particularly attractive to buyers seeking a harmonious and well-lit living environment. The apartment overlooks the society premises, creating a peaceful residential atmosphere.FacilitiesResidents benefit from a range of essential amenities designed to ensure comfort and convenience. The property includes one covered parking space and enjoys uninterrupted 24-hour water supply. Full power backup support ensures smooth functioning during power interruptions, while CCTV surveillance and dedicated security services contribute to a safe and secure living environment.The building is equipped with a lift for convenient access to all floors and offers facilities such as reserved parking and servicegoods lift provisions. The low-density nature of the project enhances privacy and provides a more peaceful residential experience.LocalitySituated in HRBR Layout, one of Bangalores most established and premium residential neighbourhoods, the apartment enjoys a prime location next to the Outer Ring Road. Schools, hospitals, supermarkets, banks, restaurants, and public transport facilities are available within approximately 500 metres, ensuring exceptional convenience for daily living. The locality offers excellent connectivity to major employment hubs including Manyata Tech Park, Hebbal, Indiranagar, and other key commercial centres. Known for its well-developed infrastructure, vibrant social ecosystem, and strong property appreciation potential, HRBR Layout continues to be one of Bangalores most desirable residential destinations.
